author: lOrm
content:
Deferred — requires unrestricted access to src/subagent.rs (FORBIDDEN under current cleanup scope).

**Fix outline:** Introduce trait AgentRegistry { fn register(...); fn get(...); fn finish(...); fn fail(...); fn list(...) } and trait TranscriptStore { fn put(...); fn get(...); fn evict(...) }. Implement on a concrete BackgroundAgentManager / InMemoryTranscriptStore. Replace the LazyLock globals at src/subagent.rs:365-366 and :381-382 with Arc<dyn AgentRegistry> + Arc<dyn TranscriptStore> stored on AppState. Coordinators can then inject scoped instances for per-leader isolation, and tests can mock both. Inverts the current Dependency Inversion violation.

**Blocking:** src/subagent.rs is reserved scope. Likely bundled with #401 split.
